span.p: Article 50 disclosure block — exactly FIVE required fields

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
content-type-tag
{decision-summary, recommendation,
decision-aid, draft, classification,
synthetic-media, other:<type>}

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
eu present (or other: cannot exclude EU persons)
=> full Article 50 disclosure mandatory

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FOUR fields pass through UNCHANGED:
ai-system-identity,
jurisdictional-applicability-tag,
content-type-tag,
generation-timestamp

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ONLY declaring-authority may transform to:
anonymized-deployer-class:product-organization
(frozen controlled-vocab enum value —
rendered byte-identical)

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 26) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Conformance test:
lacking ANY of the five fields
=> non-conformant at Level 2+

svg.text: Figure 4-1 — Article 50 Disclosure-Metadata Flow: Five Fields and the 4-of-5 Anonymization Rule (faithful to substrate v5.1.0)
